summary: Iteration 5 retest — PASS. The missing Share <Pressable> in PrayerEntryCard has been added correctly. Confirmed via live E2E on mobile viewport 390x844: saved prayer card on Reflections tab now renders BOTH `share-prayer-{id}` (gold, share-outline icon) and `delete-prayer-{id}` (red 'Remove') controls. Full flow verified: Prayer tab → input → Begin → reflection → Pray with me → AI prayer → save-prayer-button → Reflections tab → prayer-saved-card-{uuid} rendered with both actions → tap share-prayer-{uuid} → ShareImageModal opens with title 'Share your prayer' and PrayerShareCard preview (verse 'Isaiah 41:10', first-person body 'I'm placing this anxiety at Your feet...'). All 4 prayer templates (Journal/Centered/Editorial/Candlelight) and 3 aspects (Post/Square/Story) are present and switchable. Cancel closes the modal cleanly. Backdrop tap at the top of the screen did NOT close the modal in this run — minor issue, possibly related to status-bar area and pointerEvents='box-none' interaction on web RN; tapping in the middle backdrop region above the sheet should still work, Cancel provides a reliable close path. Remove still triggers the confirmation (Alert text present after tap). Backend regression suite: 25/25 PASS. No new react-native issues — carried-over deprecations from prior iterations remain (props.pointerEvents JSX warnings, expo-audio + react-native-keyboard-controller SDK pin mismatch, shadow*/textShadow* StyleSheet props, useNativeDriver web warning).

integration_issues.flow: Backdrop tap to close ShareImageModal (from saved-prayer card)
integration_issues.issue: Tapping at the top of the viewport (y≈30, above the bottom sheet) did not dismiss the modal in the web preview. The sheet uses style={{pointerEvents:'box-none'}} on top of a Pressable backdrop with StyleSheet.absoluteFillObject; on RN-web this combination is sometimes flaky near the status-bar area. Cancel button works correctly. Low priority — does not block sharing.

react_native_issues.issue: Carried over — console warns 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/src/components/ShareImageModal.tsx (line 318 uses style={{pointerEvents}} but line 431 toast still uses style with pointerEvents inline — verify migration is complete across PrayerShareCard.tsx:269 and prayer.tsx:276 too.
Carried over — Expo SDK version-pin mismatch in /app/frontend/package.json.
Carried over — Expo SDK version-pin mismatch in /app/frontend/package.json.
Carried over — 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' across scripture.tsx, prayer.tsx, reflections.tsx.
Carried over — cosmetic on web preview only, harmless on device.

action_items: (Optional polish) Investigate backdrop-tap dismissal on the saved-prayer ShareImageModal in web preview. Cancel button works, so this is low-priority cosmetic. Could simplify by removing pointerEvents='box-none' on the sheet and instead making the backdrop a sibling absolute fill that lives BEHIND the sheet, with onPress=onClose attached to its Pressable.
(Carried over) Migrate any remaining props.pointerEvents JSX usage to style.pointerEvents across ShareImageModal.tsx:318/431, PrayerShareCard.tsx:269, prayer.tsx:276.
(Carried over) Align expo-audio + react-native-keyboard-controller versions with current Expo SDK; migrate shadow*/textShadow* StyleSheet props to boxShadow/textShadow.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix is clean and consistent with the existing share pipeline. PrayerEntryCard signature now correctly destructures { entry, onDelete, onShare, sharing } and renders <Pressable testID={`share-prayer-${entry.id}`} onPress={onShare} disabled={sharing}> BEFORE the Remove Pressable, with an ActivityIndicator-while-sharing affordance and the share-outline icon + 'Share' label otherwise. Style key prayerEntryShareBtn at reflections.tsx:480 is now actually used.

Parent-side state (sharingId / sharePayload / shareOpen) is correctly lifted to ReflectionsScreen, sharing flag is correctly per-entry via `sharing={sharingId === entry.id}`, and a single <ShareImageModal payload={sharePayload} /> is mounted at the screen root — matching the Prayer tab pattern.
Recommend (non-blocking): add `tsc --noEmit` to the pre-commit / CI step to catch silent prop-drop bugs like the iteration 4 regression.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the iteration 5 feature (share-prayer-{id} renders, modal opens with PrayerShareCard preview, all 4 templates + 3 aspects switchable, Cancel closes). Remove regression intact. Prayer-tab share regression intact (save-prayer-button + share-prayer-button still rendered).

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create transient TEST_-prefixed reflections (and clean them up). Frontend: created one saved-prayer in AsyncStorage during E2E (entry id f532aba0-... — confined to test browser profile).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 retest closed the iteration 4 gap. PrayerEntryCard at /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/reflections.tsx now renders Share + Remove correctly on saved prayer cards. Backend 25/25 PASS. Only outstanding (minor) item: backdrop tap dismissal of ShareImageModal in the web preview did not close the modal when clicking near the top of the viewport in this run — Cancel still closes reliably. Next reviewer can either accept as-is or restructure the Modal so the backdrop Pressable sits beneath a non-fullscreen sheet container.
rca_of_issue: Iteration 4 root cause was a silent prop-drop in PrayerEntryCard's destructure. Iteration 5 verifies the fix: signature widened to { entry, onDelete, onShare, sharing } and Share Pressable rendered before Remove with testID=`share-prayer-${entry.id}`. Confirmed via mobile-viewport E2E: DOM probe `document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid^="share-prayer-"]')` now returns both the Prayer-tab live-share button (`share-prayer-button`) AND the saved-prayer card-scoped button (`share-prayer-{uuid}`). Modal opens with kind='prayer' (PrayerShareCard preview, 'A PRAYER' label, verse reference footnote) — not the QA variant. All template and aspect switches function.
